## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `make check` passes, or the reason for a smaller validation is documented below.
- [ ] Generated and formatted files are up to date.

## Security and operations

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private data, databases, or local artifacts are included.
- [ ] User-controlled URLs, commands, paths, and file contents are validated at the trust boundary.
- [ ] GitHub Actions permissions remain least-privilege.
- [ ] Documentation and runbooks were updated when behavior or operations changed.
